title: Stan Removal
description: Stan Removal bans stans automatically before they even join your server!
body:
**With Stan Removal, you can make sure that your Minecraft server is a stan free environment.**

With a customizable config.yml, you can control what terms a player is not allowed to have in their name.
All you have to do is write a keyword or phrase in your config.yml and anyone joining your minecraft server that has that keyword in their name will be banned. 

![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/pw/AL9nZEUYl_YtjYth35xVbbKBaQpX0MAcSHaTADzEr7FMabl0TfE7U54BncpwajA8c5xGj4WmxTIC_AKBeUzAIitxyz_ETHMloxZlF4GerGkCB8nlt4wKZfM3VtqEQOVMMrkKMGOTXZify6cFt91AnK_MSlzu=w743-h234-no?authuser=0)

![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/pw/AL9nZEWHd3GaSmK1J2ktl46-SAbyka_SjG4lgFCZIgLqBD6Chr4HtUwD8wfldLVeGb0V8bt29IG_CFvHnrFUo9G44s1FKzvNjHF1b9p1mXh14nfz65vk8QULzKXa_mlscybbceNLwo4A2ab4e5eEFZUfAyeX=w978-h104-no?authuser=0)

**This is your config.yml file:**
```
#use the built in banned terms as an example in case you want to add more
banned-terms:
 - 'dream'
  - 'notfound'
  - 'not_found'
ip-ban: false
#if ip-ban is false it wont ip ban stans, otherwise, they will be ip banned
stan-freeze: false
#if stan-freeze is true then stans will be frozen and then
#will require anyone with the stan.admin permission to ban them
```
